# SESSION_CONTEXT.md
# Auto-generated at end of every session.
# DO NOT edit manually — regenerated by /end-session.
# Replaces 7-doc session start read. ~3k tokens.

## PLATFORM
Careified — caregiver credentialing + placement platform.
Non-recommender conduit (Indeed/LinkedIn model).
Never vouches, verifies, or recommends.
All hiring decisions rest with the agency.
Three roles: caregivers, agencies, families.
Locale: CA-first (careified.ca), US (careified.com).
Soft launch: June 15 2026.

## STACK
Next.js 16.2.3, React 19, Tailwind v4 (inline styles
only — no Tailwind classes, v4 prod issues).
Prisma 7, raw pg Pool, Render PostgreSQL (snake_case).
Clerk 7.0.12 (dev keys — needs prod upgrade).
Vercel deployment. Auto-deploys on git push origin main.
Repo: ocdeployments/Careified (main).
Local: /Users/owner/careified.

## DESIGN SYSTEM
Navy #0D1B3E, Gold #C9973A/#E8B86D, Royal #1E3A8A,
Cream #F5F0E8, Warm white #F7F4F0.
Font: DM Serif Display (headlines) + DM Sans (body).
Inter is legacy — being phased out.
Cards: white, borderRadius 16px, border 1px solid #E2E8F0.
Inline styles only. No Tailwind classes.
No green as primary. No emojis in UI.

## BUILD RULES (non-negotiable)
- One file per commit
- npx tsc --noEmit before every commit — zero errors
- git diff --staged before every commit
- DO NOT push. Commit locally only.
  Romy pushes manually when ready.
- NEVER npx vercel --prod
- NEVER set Vercel env vars via CLI
- No new packages without asking
- Large files: use Python write or bash heredoc,
  NOT str_replace (causes duplicate merges)
- Stop after each commit, wait for confirmation
  UNLESS running a self-directed prompt

## AI MODEL
Primary: upstage/ring-2.6-1t:free via OpenRouter
NEVER use minimax outside lib/airecruit/ (known exception)
On credit error: log [OPENROUTER CREDITS], notify Romy,
return graceful degraded response.

## NON-RECOMMENDER RULES (legal — non-negotiable)
NEVER use: recommends, best fit, ideal match, verified by
  Careified, screens candidates, delivers professionals.
ALWAYS use: alignment_score, criteria_aligned,
  scores indicate, data shows, as reported by.
Mandatory disclaimer on every profile and AI output.
Agency makes all hiring decisions.

## DB KEY FACTS
caregivers cols: first_name, last_name, specializations[],
  credentials[], aggregate_score, photo_url,
  years_experience, placement_types[], availability_status,
  claim_status, source_agency_id, created_by_agency_id,
  profile_status, locale, claim_token (dead col — unused).
Related tables: caregiver_certifications(caregiver_id),
  caregiver_references(caregiver_id),
  caregiver_claim_tokens(caregiver_id, agency_id, token),
  caregiver_attributes(caregiver_id, key, value),
  field_discovery(field_name, agency_count, status),
  placement_reviews, agency_shortlist(pipeline_stage).
No caregiver_security table.

## ENV VARS STATUS
DATABASE_URL ✅ | OPENROUTER_API_KEY ✅
CLERK keys ✅ (dev — needs prod upgrade)
RESEND_API_KEY ✅ (live) | PHI_ENCRYPTION_KEY ✅
VAPI_API_KEY ✅ | VAPI_ASSISTANT_ID ✅
ADMIN_CLERK_USER_ID ✅ | BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN ✅
NEXT_PUBLIC_LOCALE ❌ missing from Vercel
Vapi CA phone number ❌ not provisioned
CRON_SECRET ❌ needs to be set in Vercel dashboard

## WHAT'S BUILT (summary)
Auth, agency approval, search (20+ filters, 15 demo),
shortlist, admin console, audit logging.
Profile builder Steps 0-10 (3-layer save), LivePreview,
photo upload (Vercel Blob), ID cards, verify slug.
Agency Roster: /agency/roster, CSV import, resume upload,
  LLM parse (20 fields), claim flow /claim/[token],
  caregiver_claim_tokens, field discovery loop.
AIRecruit Phases 1-6: Vapi, scoring, webhook, campaigns.
AIRecruit Session B: reference_calls consent, reference call
  Vapi config (7-question interview), reference_calls table,
  /api/airecruit/reference route, webhook handles reference
  calls, trust score recompute on completion.
AIRecruit Session C: past_employer_calls consent, employer
  Vapi config (5-question verification), employment_verifications
  table, /api/airecruit/employer route, webhook handles employer
  calls with scoring and trust recompute.
AIRecruit Session D: retry logic with call_retry_queue table,
  cron processor (/api/cron/process-call-queue every 15min),
  QuickFill alert calls (match_time_calls consent),
  profile analysis engine (/api/airecruit/analyse/[id]),
  campaign from profile API, bulk campaign actions API.
Candidate-first call experience: ask-first opening,
  pause tolerance (8s silence), human handoff phrase,
  one-question-at-a-time rule, transparent AI disclosure,
  clear closing.
Ticketing: support_tickets, ticket_messages, 3 APIs,
  /agency/support, /caregiver/support, /admin/tickets.
Demo system, security hardening (SQL injection, rate
  limits, admin auth, XSS fixed).
Resend email: sendClaimEmail + sendAgencyApprovalEmail.
Shared resume parser: lib/resume/parse-resume.ts (20 fields).
CSV LLM column mapping: lib/resume/parse-csv.ts.
Field discovery: lib/intelligence/field-discovery.ts.
Rating system: placement_reviews, caregiver_suitability,
  SuitabilityCard, BadgeDisplay components.
Contact info visible to approved agencies only.
Empty states for search, shortlist, clients.
"You're live" banner after Step 3 completion.
Alignment score tooltip with non-recommender disclaimer.
SESSION_CONTEXT.md: compressed session brain.

## WHAT'S NOT BUILT (Phase 1 blockers)
- Stripe billing (7-14 day lead time — start NOW)
- Clerk production keys (needs upgrade before June 15)
- careified.ca domain (not pointed to Vercel)
- Family portal Phase 1
- Copy session (all placeholder copy)
- AIRecruit CA phone number (Romy provisions in Vapi)

## PATTERNS TO REUSE
Auth: sessionClaims.role === 'agency' from Clerk
Rate limit: checkRateLimit + getClientIp from @/lib/rateLimit
  (pattern from app/api/tickets/create/route.ts)
Audit log: match pattern from
  app/api/roster/import/confirm/route.ts
Email: import { sendClaimEmail } from
  '@/lib/email/send-claim-email'
DB write in transaction: match app/api/roster/add/route.ts
LLM call: match lib/resume/parse-resume.ts pattern
